metadata.description: Name of the Data Collection Rule.
Resource ID of the Data Collection Endpoint.
Resource ID of the target Log Analytics workspace.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity to attach to the DCR.
Event Hub consumer group for this stream.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend _d=parse_json(RawData) | extend EventEpochTime= tolong(_d.['time']) | extend EventTimeUtc=todatetime(_d.time_dt) | extend Operation=tostring(_d.api.operation), ApiVersion=tostring(_d.api.version), ApiGroup=tostring(_d.api.group.name), ResponseCode=toint(_d.api.response.code), Message=tostring(_d.message), UrlPath=tostring(_d.http_request.url.path), UserAgent=tostring(_d.http_request.user_agent) | extend ActorName=tostring(_d.actor.user.name), ActorUid=tostring(_d.actor.user.uid), ActorTypeId=toint(_d.actor.user.type_id) | extend SrcIp=tostring(_d.src_endpoint.ip), CloudProvider=tostring(_d.cloud.provider) | extend _r0= _d.resources[0] | extend Resources=_d.resources | extend EKSNamespace=tostring(_r0.namespace), EKSResourceType=tostring(_r0.type), EKSResourceName=tostring(_r0.name), EKSResourceUid=tostring(_r0.uid), EKSResourceVersion=tostring(_r0.version) | extend Unmapped=_d.unmapped, Observables=_d.observables | project TimeGenerated=EventTimeUtc, EventEpochTime, Resources, Operation, ResponseCode, Message, UrlPath, UserAgent, ApiGroup, ApiVersion, ActorName, ActorUid, ActorTypeId, SrcIp, CloudProvider, EKSNamespace, EKSResourceType, EKSResourceName, EKSResourceUid, EKSResourceVersion, Unmapped, Observables, RawData
